comments.text: Why does noone show how Insurance Agents themselves  do an ``Application Filling Up fraud''. In India KYC is required for takin health Insurance. An executive of Insurance company fills up ur forms. Very cunningly he deliberately projects you as healthy, concealing your pre existing diseases. Beacuse the Sales Firms are front for actual Insurance companies . The Insurance companies give these `Agents ' upto 75% of first premium and then 20-33 % on each subsequent premium. So the aent , knowing that you have some disease and the Insurance Company is going to reject your form, shows you as FIT . You are insured. Problem comes after 3-5-7 years when you claim as for some operation etc. The claim is rejected on the ground that you lied to insurance company about your pre-existing illness. And you are blamed . Courts dont listen because you have signed the form and if they listen , it will be 25 years later when you are dead 2 times over. So please read and fill up the form in your own hand absolutely disclosing every illness. MUST DISCLOSE YOUR SMOKING AND DRINKING TOO OTHERWISE YOUR CLAIM WILL BE REJECTED.
